channel.title: GitHub Starlark Monthly Trending
channel.description: Monthly Trending of Starlark in GitHub

item.title: google/cel-spec
item.description: Common Expression Language -- specification and binary representation

item.title: ethpandaops/ethereum-package
item.description: A Kurtosis package that deploys a private, portable, and modular Ethereum devnet

item.title: GoogleContainerTools/distroless
item.description: 🥑 Language focused docker images, minus the operating system.

item.title: bazelbuild/rules_docker
item.description: Rules for building and handling Docker images with Bazel

item.title: pybind/pybind11_bazel
item.description: Bazel wrapper around the pybind11 repository

item.title: bazelbuild/rules_rust
item.description: Rust rules for Bazel

item.title: google/bazel-common
item.description: Common functionality for Google's open-source libraries that are built with bazel.

item.title: bazelbuild/rules_apple
item.description: Bazel rules to build apps for Apple platforms.

item.title: bazel-contrib/rules_perl
item.description: Perl rules for Bazel

item.title: aspect-build/rules_ts
item.description: Bazel rules for the `tsc` compiler from http://typescriptlang.org

item.title: 0xPolygon/kurtosis-cdk
item.description: A Kurtosis package that deploys a private, portable, and modular Polygon CDK devnet

item.title: mvukov/rules_ros
item.description: Build ROS (1) with Bazel

item.title: bazelbuild/bazel-central-registry
item.description: The central registry of Bazel modules for the Bzlmod external dependency system.

item.title: bazelbuild/rules_proto
item.description: Protocol buffer rules for Bazel

item.title: aspect-build/bazel-examples
item.description: Bazel examples

item.title: googleapis/api-common-protos
item.description: A standard library for use in specifying protocol buffer APIs.

item.title: bazelbuild/examples
item.description: Examples for Bazel

item.title: grpc/grpc-proto
item.description: gRPC-defined protobufs for peripheral services such as health checking, load balancing, etc.

item.title: bazelbuild/starlark
item.description: Starlark Language

item.title: bazelbuild/rules_scala
item.description: Scala rules for Bazel

item.title: bazelbuild/rules_swift
item.description: Bazel rules to build Swift on Apple and Linux platforms
